visualGoal: Make a cargo/mining Star Citizen pilot want a metal all-VKB HOTAS (STECS throttle + Gunfighter stick) before they hit the button-count and throttle-SKU caveats. Real product proof throughout; no procedural art. Every embedded image is a verified in-house product photo; the three unverified products (Logitech X56, WinWing/WINCTRL Orion 2 HOTAS, Virpil MongoosT-50CM3) are text-only + Amazon-search until real photos are sourced.

realProductPhotosNeeded.notes: All-rounder / buttons-per-dollar pick, currently text-only because no verified image. NOTE: space.json lists logitech-x52-pro-hotas.jpg (the X52 Pro, a DIFFERENT product) — do not substitute it for the X56. Needs a real X56 base photo before it can be a gearpick/shotgrid or before certification. Stock is wave-based; verify buyable.

Fighter crossover pick. Brand rebranded WinWing -> WINCTRL for 2026 (winctrl.com). The pre-rewrite file embedded /images/gear/space/winwing-orion-2-hotas-f16ex.jpg but that path is NOT in verified-product-images.json, so it was removed. Text-only until a verified real photo is sourced.

No-compromise standalone space throttle (CosmoSim detent). GOING END-OF-LIFE: Virpil says final batch due 2026. The pre-rewrite file embedded /images/gear/space/virpil-mongoost-50cm3-throttle.jpg which is NOT verified, so it was removed. Text-only until a verified photo is sourced AND EOL/stock is confirmed.

editorialCompositePrompts.prompt: Realistic dim-lit PC space-sim battlestation at magenta-and-cyan neon rim light, a rigid desk-edge clamp mount with an empty product-overlay slot left open for a real HOTAS stick and a separate throttle, a starfield and cockpit-canopy glow on the monitor behind, cargo-hauler HUD not a dogfight, no fake branded hardware, no fake UI text, 16:9 editorial cover.
editorialCompositePrompts.negativePrompt: fake logos, fake HOTAS hardware, warped grips, impossible ergonomics, tiny unreadable text, procedural gradient art, dogfight explosions

infographicPrompts.title: HOTAS or HOSAS by what you actually fly
content: A bit of everything -> HOTAS + good stick, add 2nd stick later
infographicPrompts.style: IgnitionSim command-center chart, large readable text, space magenta/cyan palette, real product photos as row markers for Codex overlay

infographicPrompts.title: Star Citizen HOTAS buy order
content: 1 Pick HOTAS vs HOSAS by activity
3 Go all-VKB for metal space (STECS + stick)
5 Stream Deck before a fancier throttle
6 Budget an evening for config software
infographicPrompts.style: Numbered ladder, product-photo placeholders for Codex overlays, space palette

curatorScenePrompts.prompt: Realistic adult space-sim curator Val Chen at a clean neon-lit battlestation, one hand resting on a metal HOTAS throttle with a visible detent notch, calm analytical energy, product-overlay space beside the hand, practical not fantasy, 4:5 portrait.

screenshotsOrGameMediaNeeded.need: Star Citizen Alpha 4.x SCM/NAV speed-control HUD element to illustrate why a throttle detent maps to the speed break
screenshotsOrGameMediaNeeded.notes: Use only officially licensed / owned capture or CIG press media; do not embed unverified third-party screenshots. Text carries the point without it.

openQuestions: Confirm the exact Virpil MongoosT-50CM3 end-of-life / last-order date and remaining B-stock before certifying — the buy-it-now framing depends on it.
Is the Logitech G X56 still in production and buyable in 2026, or effectively discontinued? Verify before certifying; soften to 'check current stock' if uncertain.
Confirm the exact current WinWing/WINCTRL Orion 2 F-16EX combo price on winctrl.com (~$460+ is approximate, grip-dependent).
Do we want to source real photos for the X56, Orion 2 HOTAS, and MongoosT-50CM3 so all three can become body visuals, or leave them text-only permanently?
